title: Pension and savings plans income - Canada.ca
content:
## Pension and savings plan income
Find out about reporting your pension and savings plan income.

## Types of pension income and savings plan income
- Line 11300 – Old age security (OAS) pension Report your old age security pension income.
- Line 11400 – CPP or QPP benefits Report your Canada Pension Plan and Quebec Pension Plan benefits and more.
- Line 11500 – Other pensions and superannuation Report pension and superannuation income (other than OAS , CPP and QPP ) such as payments from annuities, PRPP s and RRIF s, and pension from a foreign country.
- Line 11600 – Elected split-pension amount Report pension income that you and your spouse or common-law partner have elected to split.
- Line 12500 – Registered disability savings plan (RDSP) income Report income received from a registered disability savings plan.
- Line 12900 – Registered retirement savings plan (RRSP) income Report amounts withdrawn or received from a registered retirement savings plan.
- Line 13000 – Other income Report other income such as lump-sum payments from pensions and deferred profit-sharing plans received after leaving a plan, and retiring allowance or severance pay received.
- Line 14600 – Net federal supplements paid Report guaranteed income supplements received.
- All types of income List of the types of income to report on an income tax and benefit return.

## Forms and publications
- Claiming deductions, credits and expenses
